# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: httpbin-gateway
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - '*'
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  - port:
      number: 15443
      name: https-tls
      protocol: HTTPS
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
    tlsOptions:
      serverCertificateRef:
        name: httpbin-cert
        namespace: istio-system
      privateKeyRef:
        name: httpbin-key
        namespace: istio-system
      caCertificatesRef:
        name: httpbin-cacert
        namespace: istio-system
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  labels:
    app: envoyproxy
    release: httpbin # This can be removed and used in the above Gateway.spec section instead of using istio: ingressgateway selector.
  name: envoyproxy
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 15090
    targetPort: 8080 # This can be removed and used in the above Gateway.spec section instead of using istio: ingressgateway selector.
    protocol: TCP
  - name: https
    port: 15443
    targetPort: 8443 
    protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: envoyproxy
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: httpbin-mtls # Name changed to avoid conflict with httpbin.spec below.
  namespace: istio-system  # This can be removed and used in the above Gateway spec section instead of using istio-system.
spec:
  host: "httpbin.example.com"
  subsets:
    - name: default
      labels:
        version: v1 
        app: httpbin # This can be removed and used in the above Gateway spec section instead of using istio: ingressgateway selector.
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: httpbin-default # Name changed to avoid conflict with httpbin.spec below.
  namespace: istio-system  # This can be removed and used in the above Gateway spec section instead of using istio-system.
spec:
  host: "httpbin.example.com" 
  subsets:
    - name: default
      labels:
        app: httpbin  # This can be removed and used in the above Gateway spec section instead of using istio: ingressgateway selector.
